Research

TERRA lncRNA and Cellular Senescence.

One year of independent research at National Taiwan University. Investigated how TERRA, a long non-coding RNA transcribed from telomeric repeats, accumulates in UV-induced senescent cells and activates innate immune responses through the MDA5/RIG-I pathway while suppressing mitochondrial biogenesis via PGC-1a, NRF1, NRF2, and TFAM.

Projects

Independent work.

ML and genomics, built from scratch.

🧬

Deep Learning · Genomics

TeloML

A deep learning model predicting chromatin and telomere-associated lncRNAs from raw sequence features. Recovers TERRA's G-quadruplex motif as an emergent feature without explicit annotation. Built to extend NTU lab findings into a scalable predictive framework.

View on GitHub › Target venues: NeurIPS · ML-for-Genomics Workshop
⚡

Self-Research · In Progress

The Superhuman Experiment

A rigorous 2-month personal experiment applying lab-grade scientific method to human physiology. Full dopamine detox, clean eating, twice-daily training. Result: 10 kg reduction (66 to 56 kg).

Click to read more →
🤖

Education · Completed

AI4Kids

Instructor in the AI4Kids summer program. Translated graduate-level ML and AI concepts into accessible curriculum for younger students in Taipei.

Athletics · National Level

National Triathlon Competition

Competed in the Yilan National Triathlon Championship (宜蘭全國鐵人三項錦標賽) two consecutive years, 2025 and 2026. Training commitment: 2 hours per day for 3 months before each competition, balanced alongside a full academic load including AP coursework and NTU lab research. The discipline required to maintain consistent athletic training while conducting university-level research reflects a core part of how I approach challenges.

Yilan, Taiwan · Chinese Taipei Triathlon Association
